sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: weapon_system
special_mechanics.description: Player characters can use various weapons including boomerangs, bones, fire, flints, electricity, stone wheels, and clubs during combat platforming

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay and port information but no precise physics parameters. Genesis version described as 'close match to arcade version'. Reviews mention control responsiveness issues across ports. No documented sub-pixel system, gravity values, jump mechanics, or movement speeds in available source.
